rules.rule: Reject any `use brepkit_*` import or Cargo.toml dependency that violates the layer hierarchy: math(L0) has no workspace deps, topology(L1) depends only on math, operations(L2) on math+topology, io(L2) on math+topology+operations, wasm(L3) on all.
New code must not introduce unwrap(), expect(), or panic!() outside #[cfg(test)] modules. Existing #[allow(clippy::unwrap_used)] annotations are accepted but should not be expanded.

When copying topology entities, all data must be read into local variables before allocating new entities. Simultaneous immutable+mutable borrows of the Topology arena will not compile. See CLAUDE.md 'Common Pitfalls'.

Flag new _ => catch-all match arms on EdgeCurve or FaceSurface enums. Existing wildcards in io/src/step/writer.rs, io/src/iges/writer.rs, and operations/src/offset_face.rs must be manually verified when new variants are added.
Compare floats via tolerance.approx_eq(), never ==. Use the Tolerance struct (linear: 1e-7, angular: 1e-12).
